question: What has been on your mind lately?
What emotion have you been carrying silently?
What's something you never said out loud?
What exhausted you recently?
What have you been avoiding emotionally?
What made today feel meaningful?
If your current mood was a weather pattern, what would it be?
What is a part of yourself you've been neglecting?
Who do you wish understood you better?
When was the last time you truly felt understood?
What boundary do you need to set to protect your peace?
What uncertainty has been weighing on you?
What is one thing you can touch, see, and hear right now to ground yourself?
What would you tell a friend who was feeling exactly how you feel now?
What does loneliness feel like in your body right now?
What is a small way you can be a good companion to yourself this evening?
What changed you recently?
What is a lesson you keep learning over and over?
What small thing brought you a moment of peace today?
What's one thing you're grateful for today?
What is one small win you had today?
What makes you feel most like yourself?
If you had no obligations tomorrow, how would you spend your time?
If you could create anything without fear of judgment, what would it be?
What’s something you wish people understood about you?
What does 'home' feel like to you right now?
If your younger self met you today, what would they notice?
What’s a weird thought you had recently?
If you could send a gentle message to your past self today, what would it say?
How can you ripple this feeling of joy out to someone else today?
What part of your environment is reflecting this peace back to you?
What is your primary intention for how you want to show up today?
What is a trait in others that triggers you, and where might it live in you?
What is your body trying to tell you that you've been ignoring?
In one year, what will you be glad you started today?
When do you feel most 'on stage' in your social life?
